release_notes: Probe navigation is now deterministic: open empty tab via PUT /json/new (no URL), connect CDP, Page.enable, subscribe to loadEventFired FIRST, then Page.navigate({url}) and await load + 1.5s settle. Previous query-string URL flow raced loadEventFired and returned about:blank (39B) or partial Cloudflare interstitial (188KB without Intoli marker). Empirically reverified on Cloud4Box: 1068ms total nav+load, 40616B DOM with Intoli marker. Also: DOM is always persisted to %TEMP% (success and failure) and the path is included in the error message so the user can open it and see what actually loaded.
